title: Converting Oracle data types to PostgreSQL
summary: Google Cloud's Gemini AI acts as a tutor for converting Oracle database schemas to PostgreSQL, handling data type conversions such as VARCHAR2, NUMBER, and DATE while explaining the underlying concepts. The Database Migration Service supports developers migrating applications to the cloud with AI-assisted schema and code transformation.
